case_title: SIJIN PATRIEK KARAYIL VS. SCOTTSDALE INSURANCE COMPANY ET AL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-12-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
